changes: Added adjustable multi-core rendering parameters to balance FPS gains against image stability.
Desktop mirror can now be disabled.
Added automatic compatibility for other servers without manual toggles.
Fixed shadow and water reflection issues under multi-core rendering.
changesZh: 多核渲染新增可调参数，平衡帧率提升幅度与画面稳定性。
桌面镜像现在可以关闭。
加入其他服务器自动兼容，无需手动开关。
修复 -nohmd 启动时错误唤醒 SteamVR 的问题。
修复多核渲染下的阴影与水面反射错误。
